summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BIBI Cars CRM Customer 360 Orchestration and Publishing/Moderation Layer. Successfully tested event-based orchestration hooks for automatic customer linking and full publishing workflow pipeline.

minor_issues.issue: Some endpoints return 201 (Created) instead of 200 (OK) for update operations

passed_tests: Lead Creation with Orchestration Hook - Customer automatically created
Publishing Ingest - Vehicle listing ingested successfully
Publishing Normalize - Data normalized with auto-generated title/description
Publishing Submit Review - Status changed to pending_review
Publishing Approve - Status changed to approved with reviewer tracking
Publishing Publish - Status changed to published with publish tracking
Publishing Unpublish - Status changed to unpublished
Publishing Archive - Status changed to archived (final state)
